summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Live Stripe Payment Integration. All backend endpoints working correctly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend payments page fully functional with two payment options (Pay in Full, Pay in Installments), payment selection UI, and payment history table.
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe is in LIVE mode with real API keys (pk_live_*, sk_live_*)
Payment endpoints properly create real Stripe Payment Intents
Idempotency keys used for duplicate payment prevention
Webhook handler properly set up with express.raw() before express.json()
Student payment info correctly shows payments, subscription, and remaining balance
seed_data_creation: Test payments and subscription created during API testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe is in LIVE mode. All payment creation endpoints work and create real Payment Intents. The frontend payment page shows correctly when student has no subscription. When student has pending subscription, it shows Installment Plan Status section instead of payment options.

backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/payments/config: WORKING - returns courseFee=7999, depositAmount=500, monthlyInstallment=1249.83, totalInstallments=6, isLive=true, publishableKey
backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/payments/my-info: WORKING - returns student payment info with payments array, subscription, total_paid_gbp, remaining_gbp, can_pay flag
backend_api_endpoints.POST /api/payments/create-full-payment: WORKING - creates Stripe Payment Intent, returns client_secret, payment_intent_id, payment_id, amount_gbp
backend_api_endpoints.POST /api/payments/create-deposit-paymen: WORKING - creates Stripe Payment Intent for deposit, returns client_secret, subscription_id, monthly_amount, total_installments
backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/payments/history/:studentId: WORKING - returns payment history and subscription info
backend_api_endpoints.Server-side duplicate prevention: WORKING - checks for existing paid payments before creating new ones

frontend_payments_page.fee_summary_section: WORKING - shows Total Course Fee (£7,999), Amount Paid, Remaining with progress bar
frontend_payments_page.payment_plan_options: WORKING - shows Pay in Full (£7,999) and Pay in Installments (£500 deposit + 6 monthly) options
frontend_payments_page.payment_selection: WORKING - clicking option shows checkmark, enables Pay Now button with correct amount
frontend_payments_page.pay_full_button: WORKING - shows 'Pay £7,999 Now' (purple) when Pay in Full selected
frontend_payments_page.pay_deposit_button: WORKING - shows 'Pay £500 Deposit' (amber) when Pay in Installments selected
frontend_payments_page.installment_plan_status: WORKING - shown when student has subscription, displays status, installments_paid/total, progress bar
frontend_payments_page.payment_history_table: WORKING - shows payment_id, type, amount, status, date columns
frontend_payments_page.data_testids: WORKING - payment-plan-full, payment-plan-installment, payment-submit-btn all present

frontend_dashboard.qualified_student_banner: WORKING - shows 'Complete Your Enrollment' with amount due and Pay Now button
frontend_dashboard.application_status: WORKING - shows correct status badge and timeline

webhook_handler.route_setup: CORRECT - POST /api/webhooks/stripe registered with express.raw() before express.json()
webhook_handler.deduplication: IMPLEMENTED - ProcessedWebhookEvent table used for event deduplication

mocked_apis.Stripe_payments: NOT MOCKED - Uses real Stripe API in LIVE mode

payments_page.layout: Clean layout with Fee Summary, Payment Options, and Payment History sections
payments_page.colors: Good contrast - purple for full payment button, amber for deposit button, proper status colors
payments_page.spacing: Proper spacing between sections and cards
